title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ACC Limited Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ACC Limited Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
ACC Limited Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ACC Limited Advisory Limited:
ACC Limited Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ACC Limited Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
